en: I had a party last night How come I didn't get an invite
ko: 어젯밤에 파티했는데. 왜 나 안 불렀어?

en: I thought you'd left the country Yeah I did but I'm back now for good
ko: 네가 해외 갔다고 생각했어. 응 갔었는데 이제 영구 귀국했어

en: Let's go for lunch Where do you want to go It's up to you Hey do
ko: 점심 먹으러 가자. 어디 가고 싶어? 네가 골라. 점심 먹고

en: you fancy going roller skating after lunch
No I'm not up for that Are you sure
